invariant.name: overageImpliesRealAllowance
invariant.doc: Overage pricing only makes sense with a real included-units allowance.

note: Plan + overageImpliesRealAllowance migrated from Subscriptions (elicited there 2026-07-05T20:10:47.501Z); 2 related entries copied verbatim below

Completes the earlier migration (structure entry at 2026-07-07T05:39:01.742Z): copies the Plan-relevant judged evidence for overageImpliesRealAllowance that the original migration missed -- 4 structure entries recording plan-boundary judgments and 2 verdict entries with Plan-typed witnesses, listed here by original at timestamp and copied verbatim below in that same order: structure 2026-07-05T18:33:48.465Z (license fee / usage charge combination, defines overage vs all_units pricingMode and includedUnits semantics), verdict 2026-07-05T19:15:07.421Z (w4, Plan entity in witness), verdict 2026-07-05T19:26:51.005Z (w5, Plan entity in witness), structure 2026-07-05T19:31:51.018Z (many subscriptions may share one Plan), structure 2026-07-05T20:07:34.717Z (all_units plan may carry nonzero includedUnits, inert), structure 2026-07-05T20:10:28.527Z (overage-mode plan must have includedUnits >= 1)

question: How do license fee and usage charge combine on an invoice?
answer: Both modes supported per plan: per-seat license fee (plan.licenseFee x subscription.seats) plus EITHER overage usage (usageRate x max(0, accruedUnits - includedUnits)) OR all-usage (usageRate x accruedUnits). Plan gets a UsagePricing enum: overage | all_units; includedUnits applies in overage mode.

question: TRANSLATOR-ASKED: may two ACTIVE subscriptions reference the same Plan?
answer: PERMIT: plans are shared price definitions; many subscriptions per plan. Engine seed tpl-7-Subscription-plan rejected.

question: TRANSLATOR-ASKED (re-phrased with definitions; clean version of parked w8): may an all_units plan store a nonzero includedUnits (allowance inert under this billing mode)?
answer: PERMIT: includedUnits is inert under all_units billing; any non-negative value may remain (e.g. left over from switching modes). No mode-consistency constraint.

question: TRANSLATOR-ASKED (clean version of parked w9): is an overage-mode plan with includedUnits=0 valid?
answer: FORBID: overage plans must have includedUnits >= 1; a zero allowance should be expressed as an all_units plan instead.
